event: Patient was absolutely well 1 week ago
Chief complaints of persistent fever, body ache, throat pain, and decreased oral intake for the last 1 week
Vitals were persistently low (systolic/diastolic 90/40 mmHg) even after infusing 1500 ml of normal saline
The patient was then shifted to the medical intensive care unit for further treatment
Detailed investigations of dengue, typhoid, malaria, and leptospira demonstrated negative test results
Clinical hematology consultation obtained in view of pancytopenia, coagulation disturbance, and organomegaly (hepatosplenomegaly)
Bone marrow biopsy sample was taken and sent for histopathology
Due to progressive deterioration of clinical conditions, he was intubated
started on intravenous (IV) methylprednisolone pulse
started on TPE
Bone marrow biopsy demonstrated presence of hemophagocytosis in the bone marrow
TPE procedures were done aggressively on 3 consecutive days
he was switched to IV dexamethasone as maintenance treatment
he was extubated
Discharged after 16 days hospital admission
KFTs and LFTs were highly deranged at the time of admission
Started on broad-spectrum antibiotics
Started on noradrenaline (inotropic support)
Based on the clinical history, laboratory findings, and systemic examination results, HLH was suspected
further investigations were done in that direction
Serum ferritin 3210 ng/ml
Fasting triglyceride 619 mg/dl
Fibrinogen 50 mg/dl
LDH 2860 IU/L
Transfused 2 units packed red blood cells
Transfused 4 units single donor platelet concentrates
Transfused 24 units cryoprecipitate
Hb 11.6 g/dl 3 days after TPE completion
Platelet count 98 ×10⁹/L 3 days after TPE completion
Serum ferritin 250 ng/ml 3 days after TPE completion
Fasting triglyceride 245 mg/dl 3 days after TPE completion
Age: 19 years old
Gender: Male
KFTs and LFTs were highly deranged before the start of TPE
After three sessions of TPE, his clinical condition improved remarkably
After three sessions of TPE, his organ function improved
At the time of discharge, hematological, biochemical, and coagulation parameters were within normal range
Transfused 18 units fresh frozen plasma used during plasma exchange
Absolute neutrophil count 3.62 ×10⁹/L 3 days after TPE completion
